Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's for you, but he wanted you to know ASAP, so he texted me, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It says, "Come to Iwatodai Station." What is that guy thinking? He skipped practice today, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After practice, I made my[n]way to Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}
